prompt: What was the actual enrollment count of the clinical trial on H. pylori in acne vulgaris patients from Jan-May 2018 as listed on the NIH website?
actual: The clinical trial on H. pylori in acne vulgaris patients listed on the NIH ClinicalTrials.gov website is NCT03411733, titled "Prevalence of Helicobacter Pylori in Patients With Acne Vulgaris," sponsored by Sohag University (Egypt). The actual enrollment count was **90 participants** (type: ACTUAL). The study period ran from March 2017 to March 2018, was submitted on January 20, 2018, and last updated/posted on May 2, 2018. It was an observational cohort study with 90 participants divided into an acne vulgaris group and a healthy control group.
